hero_section.headline: Amity University Online MBA program
hero_section.subheading: Advance your professional journey with the Amity University Online MBA program that includes AI professor AMI, diverse learning methods, industry mentorship, and a futuristic academic approach.

overview_section.heading: Course Facts
overview_section.description:
A 24 month interest-free easy EMI facility is offered under the Amity online MBA program as financial aid.

Amity University Online is among the top B schools in India and all of its abroad and Indian campuses are interconnected through a highly secure pirate network of their own.

Students enrolled in the Amity Online MBA can access the last-minute revision classes offered at all Amity University campuses.

The Amity University online MBA placement assistance conducts online placement drives every fortnight.

Amity University Online is among the most renowned private universities and its vast network of notable alumni includes Kunal Khemu, Disha Patani, Himansh Kohli, Urfi Javed, etc.

specialization_section.heading: Specializations offered
specialization_section.description: The Amity University online MBA is specially designed for working professionals and offers a wide choice of career advancement opportunities in multiple industry-specified specializations, namely:

emi_section.heading: Fee Structure
emi_section.description:
The fee structure of the Amity University Online MBA program is pocket-friendly for students and working professionals as well. To assist candidates with financial constraints the fee can be paid in a semester or annual plan. A detailed fee structure of the Amity Online MBA is mentioned below:
To offer additional leverage to students, the Amity online MBA provides a 24-month zero-cost EMI option, which costs INR 8,292 /- per month. For more information, visit the official website of Amity University Online to learn the exact fee structure and financial aid offered by the university for your preferred specialization in the online MBA program.

eligibility_cards.title: Students willing to enroll in the Amity Online MBA are required to fulfill the eligibility criteria of the program along with the admission requirements mentioned below:
eligibility_cards.description: Students willing to enroll in the Amity Online MBA are required to fulfill the eligibility criteria of the program along with the admission requirements mentioned below:

eligibility_cards.title: The applicant must have completed a 10+2 formal educational qualification from a recognized board of education.
eligibility_cards.description: The applicant must have completed a 10+2 formal educational qualification from a recognized board of education.

eligibility_cards.title: Along with the 12  years of formal education, a bachelor’s degree in any domain is required from a valid and recognized university.
eligibility_cards.description: Along with the 12 years of formal education, a bachelor’s degree in any domain is required from a valid and recognized university.

eligibility_cards.title: The applicant must be familiar with and have an intermediate understanding of the English language.
eligibility_cards.description: The applicant must be familiar with and have an intermediate understanding of the English language.

subjects.subject_name: Management in Action Social Economic and Ethical Issues

reviews.review_text: My experience with amity online MBA was nothing less than a roller coaster ride for me as I was among the covid batch but the univeristy was very supportive and I enjoyed it.
Being a working professional enrolling in an online MBA is a challenge but amity online assisted me at every stage of my academic journey. Kudos to them.
The amity online mba faculty members are very friendly and helped in scoring good marks in a short span of time.
Everything is okay about amity university online but there are a few areas of improvement but everything seems nice to me. I recommend it to others too.

faq_items.question: What is the Amity University Online MBA fee?
faq_items.answer: The entire 2 year Amity University Online MBA fee is INR 1,99,000/- without incurring any financial aid.

faq_items.question: What is the ranking of Amity University Online MBA?
faq_items.answer: Amity University Online ranks #35 under the universities category of the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF).

faq_items.question: Does Amity Online provide placement?
faq_items.answer:
Yes, Amity University Online MBA placement support offers an enormous number of hiring partners i.e. 500+ active partners.

Can I take direct admission to the Amity Online MBA?

Yes, if you have scored a minimum of 40% aggregate marks in graduation then you can seek direct admission under the Amity Online MBA program.

What career opportunities can I expect after completing the Amity Online MBA?

A student is entitled to opt for multiple job opportunities after completing the Amity Online MBA depending on the specialization chosen by them.

faq_items.question: How is the Amity University Online MBA program?
faq_items.answer:
Amity University Online MBA is an ideal choice for students and working professionals as Amity University Online is among the top B Schools.

How can I apply for the Amity University Online MBA program?

You can apply directly for the Amity University Online MBA through its official website.

What are the requirements to join the Amity Online MBA program?

The applicant must have completed a valid bachelor’s degree with a 10+2 formal education to join the Amity Online MBA program.
